summary: Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed for Campus Vote API (auth, voter list auto-approve/promote, election CRUD with role guards, candidate creation incl. invalid position rejection, vote casting with idempotency by client_id, duplicate-vote rejection, results admin-only, admin stats, voter management, bulk voter list, closed-election blocks voting). Frontend: landing + login + register pages render correctly with pastel academic theme; admin login form submits but in the smoke test the page remained on /login (token may not have been stored or redirect didn't fire within wait window).

ui_bugs.issue: After clicking Sign in with valid admin creds the URL stayed on /login during the playwright smoke. Backend /api/auth/login works (verified via pytest). Likely needs investigation: token persistence in localStorage 'cv_token' or redirect after AuthContext.login resolves. Could also be a timing issue but worth verifying.
Inputs lack name= and data-testid attributes (Login email/password, Register name/email/student_id/password). Makes automated UI testing brittle.

issues: Looks clean with academic pastel theme; no contrast issues observed in smoke.

action_items: Investigate admin login redirect: confirm AuthContext stores token in localStorage('cv_token') and navigates to /admin after success.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (login/register inputs and buttons, dashboard buttons, vote buttons) to enable robust E2E testing.
Consider adding name attribute on form fields for accessibility & testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in modern FastAPI; prefer lifespan handlers.

set_auth_cookie sets samesite='none', secure=True but CORS uses allow_credentials=False and allow_origins=['*'] -> cookie auth across origins won't actually work; auth relies entirely on Bearer token (which is fine, but the cookie code is dead/misleading).
Vote endpoint computes candidate map even when no selections; minor perf nit.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook flagged 5-fail lockout). Currently any number of bad logins are allowed.
Candidate PATCH does not validate that new position_id belongs to the same election (regression risk).
No tests/seed for /api/auth/logout success path (works trivially; OK).

success_rate.frontend: partial smoke - landing/login/register render OK; admin redirect after login not verified

test_credentials: admin: ltungcs2009@gmail.com / Lemmuel26Tungcul_ (verified working at API level)
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_ users, voter_list entries, an election + 2 candidates each run; not cleaned up. Recommend cleanup fixture in next iteration if DB pollution becomes an issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is comprehensive and stable. For frontend, write Playwright using label-based selectors (page.get_by_label('Email'), get_by_label('Password'), get_by_role('button', name='Sign in')) until data-testid is added. After login, AuthContext stores token under localStorage key 'cv_token' and should redirect to /admin (admin) or /student (student). Verify navigation by waiting for URL pattern. Brute-force lockout is NOT implemented - flag if required.
rca of the issue: Frontend admin login appearing not to redirect: not reproduced as a definitive bug in this run; pytest confirms the login API works with the supplied credentials. Likely either (a) timing/wait too short in the smoke script, or (b) AuthContext state update timing. Main agent should verify by manually exercising login at the public URL and inspecting localStorage('cv_token') and current route after Sign in.
